name: tc-unit-mutation-typescript-fixtures
description: Real TypeScript projects for the `unit mutation` rule's integration/e2e tests (#202). Each subdirectory is a tiny library whose colocated vitest suite is run under Stryker; the suites are wired so `killed` catches every mutant and `survivors` (coverage-passing but assertion-light) leaves several. Installed once here (shared node_modules); the CLI runs Stryker from each project dir, which resolves this install via Node's parent lookup.
